title: A Cry for Help
description: As you pass through a narrow mountain pass, desperate cries echo from below. A traveler dangles from the edge of a cliff, desperately clinging to a loose root. They won't survive much longer.

options.title: Pull Them Up
options.description: Risk your own safety to rescue the stranded traveler.

options.title: Demand Payment
options.description: "I'll save you... but it'll cost you."

options.title: Keep Walking
options.description: You pretend not to hear the cries and continue down the road.
